known_gaps: External guideline artifacts are not cached or license-verified.
Clinical and safety review is incomplete.
Simulation set is below release coverage requirements.

exposure.asbestos.wording: 직업이나 환경에서 석면에 노출된 적이 있나요?

history.recent_infection.wording: 피로가 시작되기 전이나 최근에 감염병 또는 몸살 같은 질환을 앓았나요?

medication.possible_fatigue_contributor.wording: 현재 복용 중인 약, 건강기능식품 또는 최근 받은 치료를 알려 주세요. 없으면 없음이라고 답해 주세요.

mental_health.anhedonia.wording: 최근 2주 동안 하던 일의 흥미나 즐거움이 뚜렷하게 줄었나요?

mental_health.low_mood.wording: 최근 2주 동안 대부분의 날에 기분이 가라앉거나 우울하거나 희망이 없다고 느꼈나요?

mental_health.suicidal_ideation.wording: 최근 죽고 싶거나 자신을 해치고 싶다는 생각이 들었나요?

mental_health.suicidal_intent_or_plan.wording: 지금 실행할 의도나 구체적인 방법·계획이 있나요?

patient.ever_smoked.wording: 현재 또는 과거에 담배를 피운 적이 있나요?

patient.immunocompromised.wording: 면역을 낮추는 약을 사용하거나 면역이 약해지는 질환·치료를 받고 있나요?

sleep.hours_per_night.wording: 보통 하루 밤에 몇 시간 자나요?

sleep.insomnia.wording: 잠들기 어렵거나 자주 깨거나 너무 일찍 깨나요?

sleep.snoring_gasping_or_choking.wording: 자는 동안 심한 코골이, 숨 멎음, 헐떡임 또는 목 막히는 소리를 들었다고 하나요?

symptom.black_or_bloody_stool.wording: 검고 끈적한 변이나 피가 섞인 변을 봤나요?

symptom.cognitive_difficulty.wording: 최근 집중, 기억, 단어 찾기가 어려워졌나요?

symptom.confusion.wording: 평소와 다르게 혼란스럽거나 반응이 둔하거나 깨우기 어려운가요?

symptom.dyspnea.wording: 숨쉬기가 힘든가요? 없음, 가벼움, 중간, 심함으로 답해 주세요.

symptom.fatigue.current.wording: 지금도 평소와 다른 피로감이나 기운 없음이 계속되나요?

symptom.fatigue.functional_impact.wording: 피로 때문에 일·학업·집안일·씻기 같은 일상활동이 얼마나 줄었나요? 없음, 가벼움, 중간, 심함으로 답해 주세요.

symptom.fatigue.relieved_by_rest.wording: 충분히 쉬거나 자고 나면 피로가 뚜렷하게 좋아지나요?

symptom.fatigue.severity.wording: 피로는 가벼움, 중간, 심함 중 어디에 가깝나요?

symptom.new_unilateral_weakness.wording: 갑자기 한쪽 얼굴·팔·다리에 힘이 빠지거나 말이 어눌해졌나요?

symptom.post_exertional_delayed_or_prolo.wording: 활동 후 악화가 뒤늦게 시작하거나 회복에 하루 이상 걸리나요?

symptom.post_exertional_malaise.wording: 적은 신체·정신 활동 뒤에도 피로와 다른 증상이 지나치게 심해지나요?

symptom.syncope.wording: 최근 갑자기 의식을 잃거나 쓰러진 적이 있나요?

symptom.thirst_and_polyuria.wording: 평소보다 갈증이 심하고 소변을 자주 또는 많이 보나요?

symptom.unrefreshing_sleep.wording: 충분히 잔 것 같아도 개운하지 않고 지친 채로 깨나요?

elements.limitation: Clinical sex used for interview routing is not automatically equivalent to every USCDI sex-related element.

elements.data_element: Medication, Dose, Dose Unit, Indication and Dispense Status
Blood Pressure, Heart Rate, Respiratory Rate, Temperature and Pulse Oximetry
Laboratory Test, Result, Result Status and Specimen
Clinical Test and Result or Report
Patient Goals and Care Experience Preference
Encounter Type, Time, Location and Disposition
Care Team Member Identity, Role and Contact
Medication, Laboratory, Imaging and Clinical Test Orders
History and Physical or Progress Note

limitations: Coverage indicates candidate data-population capability, not US certification or conformance.
A mapped Fact does not make the data element clinically required for this encounter.
US-specific vocabularies and regulatory semantics do not replace Korean bindings or policy.

elements.display: Patient concern, goal and expected outcome
Pain presence and NRS score when pain applies
Patient, proxy or record information source

nodes.display: Snoring Gasping or Choking During Sleep

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: Persistent unexplained fatigue, functional impact, weight loss, mood change or sleep-related gasping warrant clinical assessment.
Sleep, lifestyle, stress, mood, hormonal change, illness, treatment and medicines are relevant contexts.
Associated palpitations, dyspnoea, pallor, thirst, urinary frequency, weight loss and thyroid-like symptoms inform evaluation but do not establish a diagnosis.
artifacts.title: Tiredness and fatigue

assertions: Persistent debilitating fatigue, post-exertional malaise, unrefreshing sleep and cognitive difficulty with reduced activity are characteristic features requiring assessment when unexplained.
Assessment must consider medical, mental-health and social context and exclude other explanations; the interview must not assign ME/CFS.
artifacts.title: ME/CFS: diagnosis and management

assertions: Persistent fatigue in adults and unexplained fatigue with smoking, asbestos exposure, cough, dyspnoea, chest pain, weight loss or appetite loss can require investigation.
The interview records these features and age context without diagnosing cancer.
artifacts.title: Suspected cancer: recognition and referral — fatigue

assertions: Mood assessment considers duration, function, sleep, lifestyle, stressors, medicines, alcohol and substance use.
People with depressive symptoms should be asked directly about suicidal ideation and intent; considerable immediate risk requires urgent specialist help.
artifacts.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management

assertions: STOM confirmed active 84229001 Fatigue and 248274002 Lack of energy concepts.
Finding site and Severity were allowed for both concepts.
MRCM validates terminology modeling only and does not control clinical questions, diagnoses, priority or safety.
artifacts.title: STOM SNOMED CT lookup and MRCM allowed attributes for fatigue
